title: Gate and rename Zephyr legacy CBOR native surfaces
description: Decision follow-up from project-LICHEN-py4c.1.18. CONFIG_LICHEN_NATIVE, lichen/lib/native, lichen_native symbols, and lichen,native-uart devicetree naming currently refer to the historical CBOR protocol and serial-local HAL path. Preserve board compatibility while making legacy CBOR status explicit and preventing new LCI firmware work from depending on ambiguous native names.
acceptance_criteria: No-hardware Zephyr/native_sim or qemu builds/tests verify existing native_init/native_parse coverage, board configs that currently enable CONFIG_LICHEN_NATIVE, and any compatibility aliases or deprecation warnings. EC2 Twister evidence recorded; no physical boards required.
close_reason: Future work - Zephyr legacy CBOR surface gating deferred to LCI migration phase
